# Conteo — Simple, Private Web Analytics

## What is Conteo?

Conteo is a privacy-first web analytics platform that lets website owners track
visitor traffic without using cookies, without violating GDPR, and without
sharing data with advertisers. It is a direct alternative to Google Analytics.

One line of code. Real-time data. Zero cookies.

## Key Facts

- **Product name:** Conteo
- **Website:** https://conteo.online
- **Category:** Web analytics, privacy analytics, GDPR-compliant analytics
- **Pricing:** Free plan available (no credit card required)
- **Technology:** SaaS, cloud-hosted, JavaScript snippet
- **Script size:** Under 1KB
- **Data storage:** All data stays with the site owner, never sold or shared

## Who is it for?

- Indie developers who want free analytics for side projects
- Small business owners who need simple website metrics
- Bloggers and content creators tracking post performance
- Privacy-conscious teams that need GDPR compliance without cookie banners
- Anyone looking for a Google Analytics alternative that respects user privacy

## Pricing Plans

- **Free** — Up to 10,000 visits/month, 1 site, full dashboard, no credit card
- **Pro** — $4.90/month, up to 50,000 visits/month, up to 5 sites
- **Business** — $9.90/month, up to 100,000 visits/month, unlimited sites

All plans include: real-time dashboard, top pages, traffic sources, country and
device breakdown, CSV export.

## Key Differentiators vs. Google Analytics

- No cookies — no consent banner required
- GDPR, CCPA, and ePrivacy compliant by default
- Data is never sold or used for advertising
- Lightweight script (<1KB vs Google's 45KB+)
- Simple dashboard — no weeks of learning curve
- Free forever for small sites (under 10K visits/mo)

## Key Features

- Real-time analytics dashboard
- No cookies required
- GDPR compliant by design
- Lightweight tracking script (<1KB)
- Top pages and traffic sources
- Country and device breakdown
- CSV data export
- One-line setup (single <script> tag)

## How to Get Started

1. Sign up free at https://conteo.online/signup (no credit card)
2. Add your website domain
3. Copy the one-line tracking script
4. Paste it before </head> on your website
5. Data starts flowing immediately

Full setup guide: https://conteo.online/docs

## Competitors / Alternatives

Conteo is commonly compared to:
- Google Analytics (GA4) — Conteo is cookie-free and privacy-first
- Plausible Analytics — Conteo has a free plan; Plausible starts at $9/mo
- Fathom Analytics — Conteo is free for small sites; Fathom starts at $14/mo
- Umami — Conteo is cloud-hosted; Umami requires self-hosting
- Matomo — Conteo requires no server setup; Matomo is self-hosted

## Content Resources

Blog: https://conteo.online/blog
Docs: https://conteo.online/docs
Pricing: https://conteo.online/pricing
Comparison vs. Google Analytics: https://conteo.online/vs/google-analytics
About: https://conteo.online/about

## Contact & Legal

- Privacy policy: GDPR compliant, no personal data collected from tracked visitors
- All analytics data is owned by the site owner
- No data sharing with third parties or advertisers
